name: AeroTune Headphones
description: Wireless noise-canceling headphones with 40-hour battery life and immersive balanced sound for work, gaming, and travel.

name: Nimbus Smartwatch
description: Track fitness goals, monitor heart rate, and sync notifications with a lightweight AMOLED smartwatch designed for daily use.

name: UrbanTrail Sneakers
description: Breathable all-day sneakers featuring cushioned midsoles and slip-resistant grip, built for city walks and light workouts.

name: Comfy Knit Hoodie
description: Soft cotton-blend hoodie with a relaxed fit, ribbed cuffs, and dual-layer hood for cooler evenings and casual weekends.

name: Lumina Desk Lamp
description: Minimal LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness levels and warm-to-cool temperature presets for focused study sessions.

name: Stoneware Dinner Set
description: 12-piece durable dinnerware set with matte finish and microwave-safe construction for everyday meals and hosting guests.

name: CoreFlex Yoga Mat
description: High-grip, anti-slip yoga mat with extra cushioning and moisture-resistant texture to support yoga, Pilates, and stretching.

name: PowerBand Resistance Kit
description: Five-level resistance band set with door anchor and handles, ideal for strength training routines at home or on the go.

name: TravelLite Backpack
description: Water-resistant commuter backpack with padded laptop compartment, hidden anti-theft pocket, and ergonomic shoulder straps.

name: HydroFlow Steel Bottle
description: Double-wall insulated stainless steel bottle keeps beverages cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours with leak-proof cap.

name: PulseWave Earbuds
description: Compact true-wireless earbuds with clear voice pickup, deep bass tuning, and up to 24 hours of backup with the charging case.

name: StrideFlex Joggers
description: Stretch-fit daily wear joggers with breathable fabric, tapered ankle design, and comfort-first waistband for long use.

name: AuraGlow Table Light
description: Modern bedside table light with touch dimming, warm glow mode, and compact footprint for study desks and night stands.

name: GripPro Training Mat
description: Durable workout mat with textured anti-slip surface and medium cushioning, ideal for bodyweight sessions and yoga drills.

name: TrailSip Travel Flask
description: Leak-resistant stainless travel flask designed for office and commute, with temperature retention and easy-clean finish.
